name: Frostline Crossing Route
feel: The crossing rewards accuracy over bravery; launch windows, rescue readiness, and loss records define the route more than raw distance does.
paperwork_and_permission_model: Travel along Frostline Crossing Route is easiest when intentions, cargo, and patronage are legible before questions begin.
patrol_rhythm: Daylight oversight is visible and procedural; night oversight is thinner, more suspicious, and less forgiving.
after_dark_change: After sunset, traffic thins, trust narrows, and informal power brokers matter more than posted rules.
